summary: A web application with Admin and User panels featuring a red-orange mixed gradient theme. Admin panel at /admin route, User panel at / route, with visible links section showing both panel URLs.
architectural_notes: Admin panel is served at /admin route, User panel at / route
Both panels share a unified red-orange mixed gradient theme

existing_features.title: Apply a red and orange mixed gradient theme consistently across the entire frontend UI — including all headers, sidebars, navigation bars, buttons (primary and secondary), backgrounds, cards, badges, tabs, modals, and hover/active states — for both the User panel (/) and Admin panel (/admin). Use a cohesive palette of deep reds (#DC2626, #B91C1C), vibrant oranges (#EA580C, #F97316), and red-orange gradients (e.g., from-red-600 to-orange-500). Replace any existing blue, purple, or neutral accent colors with this red-orange scheme.

Add a clearly visible 'Panel Links' section on the home page (HomePage.tsx) that displays direct clickable links to both panels: User Panel at the root URL (/) and Admin Panel at /admin. This section should be styled with the red-orange theme, use recognizable icons or labels, and make it easy for visitors to navigate to either panel.

new_feature_requests.summary: Apply red and orange mixed gradient theme across the entire UI (buttons, headers, sidebar, backgrounds, hover effects) for both Admin and User panels
Add a visible links section that clearly shows both Admin panel (/admin) and User panel (/) URLs after deployment
